calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing; Summary Of The Case
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Shawna Van Tree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq., especially appearing for Plaintiff, American Express Centurion Bank,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Marc Josef,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $33,327.64
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $729.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $34,056.64
Judgment signed in open court.
